name: claude-code-usage-guard
description: A zero-dependency Claude Code plugin that injects fresh 5h/weekly quota into Claude's context and warns before plan limits. Network stays off unless optional ntfy is configured.

scripts.test: node tests/selftest.mjs && node tests/reset-coach.test.mjs && node tests/nudge.test.mjs && node tests/prompt-context.test.mjs

author: eltonylfgi-blip
